name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan or a 9x13 cake pan.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, soda, and cinnamon. Set aside.
4. Cream together margarine, cocoa, and sugar until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Combine vanilla extract, orange peel, and zucchini, then stir into the mixture.
7. Gradually add dry ingredients, alternating with milk.
8. Stir in chopped nuts (if using).
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 1 hour.
